---
title: "AlleQuellen"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r setup}
 if (!requireNamespace("needs"   )) install.packages("needs")
 if (!requireNamespace("excelbib")) install_github("Enno-W/excelbib")
needs("excelbib", "xfun")
xlsx_to_bib(from_root("References.xlsx"))
```

@EU2008PhysicalActivityGuidelines
@Lee2008
@Brand2014
@Kelly2008
@Cale2006
@Sallis2012YouthPhysicalActivity
@Bully2015
@Maher2014
@Bartholomew2006
@assembly2017resolution
@Foster2021
@Peterson1982
@Watson1988
@RKI_2022
@WHO_2023
@Amireault2013
@Gilchrist2018Pride
@Gilchrist2018Grit
@Mack2015
@Tracy2007
@Marcus1997
@Marcus1993
@Martin1984
@Stetson2005
@lme4
@Marlatt1984
@Tompuri2015
@hollmann2009sportmedizin
@Eckert2014
@Roordink2021
@Piggin2020
@caspersen1985physical
@Krug2013
@Ainsworth2020
@Mcauley1994
@Buckworth2007
@WHO2010
@Ding2016
@Warburton2006
@Myers2004
@Lee2012
@Paluska2000
@Mikkelsen2017
@Carter2016
@Gillison2009
@Foster2017
@Grant1998
@Foster2001
@Day2004
@Crawford2004
@Corr1996
@winter1994manual
@Sokolowski2000
@bandura1977social
@Hox2017-dx
@Green2016
@Li2015
@Cohen2013
@nezlek2008introduction
@ellis2020hierarchical
@nlme2023
@lme42025
@Engel1977
@Ledochowski2016
@Cooney08
@Morres2018
@Sterne2009
@rlanguage2024
@nlme
@Wang2015
@Munaf2017
@manyanalysts
@Kummerfeld2023
@Perkel2022
@Amrhein2019
@Mahmood2023
@FernandezLazaro2019
@Goddard2020
@Brewer2000
@mcauley1990attrition
@Courneya2004
@McAuley1992
@weiner1986attribution
@Heider1958
@harvey1976new
@manusov2008attribution
@Russell1980
@eid1999intraindividual
@Watson1985
@steyer1999latent
@Reich2003
@breyer2016panas
@Schoedel2023
@Meteier2022
@kelley1967attribution
@Klein1976
@Alloy1984
@Seligman1979
@Hox2017
@Field2012
@hox2017chapter2
@Tsai2008
@Nezlek2006
@Curran2011
@Koo2016
@stiensmeier1985attributionsstil
@beck1974assessment
@Williams2016
@Rhodes2015
@Stevens2020
@Williams2014
@Jekauc2015
@Rhodes2009
@McAuley1990
@Minifee1998
@Courneya1996
@Schoeneman1990
@Nickel2013
@Spink2015
@Shields2005
@Emerson2015
@Lee2016
@Ekkekakis2003
@Ekkekakis2005
@Nosek2018
@Aust2012
@Sallis1990
@Irvin1999
@Witkiewitz2009
@Mueller2010
@Eckert2014
@Vanhees2005
@Kohl2000
@McLean2016
@Duncan2002
@Nigg2008
@NationalAcademies2019
@Yang2025
@Gratz2004
@Buckholdt2014
@Parfitt2009
@Forster2020
@Warburton2006
@Neufer2015
@Khan2001
@Lubans2016
@McNeill2006
@Sirois2018
@Shiffman2005
@Svendsen2022
@Cohen1988
@lott
@Mazziotta2016
@Kinast2010
@Bolten2006
@Hofstede1980
@Hofstede2001
@Minkov2017
@Ridgers2010
@hussy2013
@stahl2023expertise
@Biddle2008
@Peres2010
@Hilton2016
@Teuber2022
@Gardner2012
@Lally2013
@Fuchs2015

::: refs
:::
